review_title: The Ultimate Solution for Data Management and Protection
author: Burhan A.
pros: Instant recovery of VMs using the direct mount feature of Rubrik. Ability to archive your backups to cloud storage. Ease of use
cons: Pricing and complex licensing options and naming of the features. Limited integration options with opensource virtualization solutions like Proxmox/KVM etc.

review_title: Great solution, but we miss our local sales team
description: We have been using it for three years, and are happy with it. It is easy to manage, and fairly intuitive.
author: Jeff B.
pros: Easy to use, recoveries are fast, recovery options are flexible, and it has great security and ransomware protection features.
cons: Our local sales team left about two years ago, and since then, our relationship with Rubrik has basically gone away. We were able to be much more engaged with the solution when we had a local team that we were constantly in contact with.

review_title: I am patiently awaiting the release of 4.1 which should bring massive improvements .
description: We haven't progressed far enough with the product to see value to our overall business objectives.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Rubrik is used to protect 1,000+ objects in my environment with 90%+ being VMware virtual machines. It is being used across the whole organization, globally, with three clusters existing to support our global initiatives. It provides backup protection for my objects and also provides a way to migrate certain data profiles into the cloud. Searchable Content - search for file across datasets allows for quick restores.
cons: I am patiently awaiting the release of 4.1 which should bring massive improvements to the functionality of the system as well as add additional features missing from the product. I feel Rubrik is well suited for customers that want to run high amount of snapshots per day and wish for a lower RPO granularity for restore. It is less appropriate for perhaps customers that want to run all their backups in one evening because of how jobs are queued and spread across the backup window. Missing functionality - allow for more granular intervals across different time segments.
author_profession: Storage and Backup Engineer - Lead Storage Architect
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: RUBRIK BACKUP SOLUTION FOR SECURE DATA
author: Prem K.
pros: the immutable file system which make it stand outside the cyber attack
cons: the integration with the third party sql cluster software is not compactable

review_title: Great performer
description: We really like Rubrik and ar looking to expand it to other companies.
author: Bradley C.
pros: Daily management was very easy and the user interface is easy to learn.
cons: Some of the initial hardware setup was a little confusing but we were able to figure it out

review_title: I trusted them with our data and never regretted it.
description: Rubrik is the product I recommend to any business looking for backing up environments, especially virtual ones and databases. Have been using them for 6 years and have never regretted choosing them. The proof was when we survived a cyber attack thanks in large part to their recoverability and support during the experience.
author: Blake W.
pros: The web management portal is fast, api-based from the start, and top notch customer service and account teams. They have recovered all systems for me in the past and work quickly to resolve any issues. Non-stop updates for the product to add features and fix bugs.
cons: The reporting and filtering continues to need improvement though they have been adding features along the way. The AWS-hosted clusters are not as stable as the hosted hardware clusters but never any data loss in either case.

review_title: Great product that makes data backup and recovery easy
description: The experience with Rubrik has been very positive. It has taken the job of data backup and recovery and enhanced it to secure the data with the many features that Rubrik continue to add with data security features with updates. Having the single gui to manage multiple sites make managing the backup and dat recoveries painless.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is very easy to setup backups and easy for anyone on the IT team to do backups
cons: Nothing I can think of at the moment. Rubrik keeps adding features that are great.

review_title: Fantastic data protection product
description: I'm using Rubrik for 8 years and I saw the evolution and the capabilities growing over the time. They are very innovative
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Rubrik is bringing simplicity where usually complexity is the rule. It helps to secure your data, your environment and can detect data loss and damages before they are actually reported
cons: I don't dislike anything about Rubrik, may be a bit too early to announce new feature before having them GA

review_title: Rubrik has agreat feature and potential
description: Even with problem or frustration, Rubrik is still one of the best backup platform
author: David P.
pros: Support Web single pane of glass community Api first
cons: Lack of GCP feature update QA seem to be not fully appropriate UI sometime not uniform Developpement still seem to be push and forget...(mean missing to include stuff when released...so need to be patience to have the whole thing)

review_title: Old man yells at cloud
description: Overall everything works as described. It needs proper Postgresql support and better backwards compatability for legacy systems and the development is far too cloud focused for me. I want local access to the system and to be able to manage in the datacenter.
author: Kristinn Rafn E.
pros: The simplicity and how things just work. Rubrik support is also excellent unless you need support with Envoys.
cons: Being forced to move from on-prem management to cloud

review_title: Operational Review: Rubrik VM Backup Performance and Reliability Feedback
author: William T.
pros: As a Service Desk Technician, you might appreciate Rubrik's straightforward user interface and ease of use, which can streamline the backup process for VMs. The automation features could also be a highlight, reducing manual intervention and saving time. Additionally, Rubrik's fast recovery capabilities might stand out, ensuring minimal downtime in case of data loss. Lastly, the scalability of the solution could be a pro, as it allows for growth without significant changes to the backup infrastructure. These aspects could contribute to a positive experience with Rubrik for VM backup in a company setting.
cons: Based on the information available, it seems there have been several issues reported with Rubrik, particularly concerning support cases and technical difficulties. For instance, there was a case where backup jobs were unable to replicate, causing significant delays and frustration due to the lack of timely support and data requested by the users123. Additionally, there were concerns about the reliability of the product, as jobs that were running smoothly suddenly halted without clear explanatio

review_title: A very satisfied customer
description: Very good and a very happy customer, form deployment to after support.
author: Waseem H.
pros: Its not just backups, its data security, if you are still just taking flat backups with no data validation and security checks then you need to update.
cons: Not much to complain about, but if there is something, then there will be delayed support for AHV products.

review_title: Rubrik just works.
description: Its been great. I reached out on Thanksgiving Day with an bug in the software causing me an issue and it was fixed within 12 hours. Other than a few bugs that have very quickly been ironed out, Rubrik has worked flawlessly for us
author: Jesse F.
pros: Its easy to use and it works every time. Support is fantastic if you have to get help.
cons: Nothing. I've not had any issues that weren't resolved very quickly

review_title: Backing it up
description: Experience was above average for vendors.
author: Jaum G.
pros: It meets or exceeds industry requirements.
cons: Least favorable aspect was the cost, and getting the right amount of storage

review_title: Best Tool in the market for Backups and Recovery!
description: Very Happy with the experience of using Rubrik so far, UI is very user friendly , it has allowed us to easily plan our data backups and recovery. Its multi-cloud support has helped us in managing our data quiet effectively.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1. Friendly User Interface and easy to use 2. Allows on the click options to backup, replicate and restore. 3. Reduces manual intervention by automating SLA for backups 4. Provides good visual insights and monitoring features 5. Support for multiple cloud platforms makes it unique
cons: 1 Cost is a bit high as compared to other similar products 2. More options for report generation can be provided

review_title: Rubrik is used as the single backup platform within the business.
description: It's improved operational efficiency, as we now don't have to spend time scheduling backups, and has created very tangible savings. In the next 5 years we expect to save over 55% switching from our legacy provider to Rubrik. It's also mitigated us against any future data centre blackouts through its Azure replication capabilities - while significantly reducing our power consumption and footprint in the data centre.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1. Replication to cloud 2. SLA based backups 3. Data immutability 4. Single platform 5. It's improved operational efficiency, as we now don't have to spend time scheduling backups, and has created very tangible savings. In the next 5 years we expect to save over 55% switching from our legacy provider to Rubrik. It's also mitigated us against any future data centre blackouts through its Azure replication capabilities - while significantly reducing our power consumption and footprint in the data centre.
cons: Out of the box reporting could be better - However the API interface allows the generation of custom reports and the ability to retrieve any detail from the system
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy backup and Secured Data Storage Software.
author: Arjun J.
pros: Offers simple backup and cloud backup. Provides a secured data storage with encryption facility. It also has backup scheduling and backup log facility. Stores customer database and gives precise reporting & statistics.
cons: Still now I have not found any type of dislikes of the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Cloud management software
description: I have used few cloud management software during my previous employments and I can recommend this as one of the best software in the competition.
author: hasini W.
pros: I have used features like cloud backup, management dashboard, instant recovery and data privacy. Setup process is simple and anyone can work without any hassle. The interfaces are very user friendly. The backup speed is fast and easy to replicate among different data centers.
cons: Interfaces are easy user friendly and I think they could improve more to the current standard level.

review_title: Great performance and usability
description: Backup times have been greatly reduced as well as the space consumed thanks to the great deduplication.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The integration of this with vcenter is fantastic. The backups are lightening fast and restores are exceptionally easy.
cons: I really wish this would integrated with out StoreOnce backend better than it does or be offered as a software only solution that we can leverage our own hardware for.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great product that is easy to implement but has a lot of useful features
description: Fast and simple backup and restore with easy archive to the cloud
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy implementation, good REST API interface, easy to create backups and DR systems with this product
cons: Limited reporting built in to the system and not much report or audit customization availible. Also lackluster RBAC implementation.

review_title: Rubrik
description: Rubrik was an easy fit for my business application needs. It was a one stop shopping for all Cloud and Security needs.
author: Mindy R.
pros: Cloud Data and Backup Management, security and data dashboarding.
cons: there was not much I did not like about this software. It was very comprehensive and supportive of end users.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Rubrik is very slick, easy to use, and well built.
author: James Y.
pros: Frankly, Rubrik is an amazing product. It works seamlessly, has several advanced features, and is extremely simple to use. It just...works after you set it up. Their marketing is also pretty awesome, with several themed boxes of goodies you'll actually want to keep and use.
cons: Rubrik is pretty expensive as far as backup solutions go. A lot of organizations will have a hard time justifying the cost, but given the ease of use in recovering from a backup, it can save a lot of headaches and even some downtime. Do some ROI analysis against your cost of downtime to compare. I think it's worth it for a fair amount of SME's doing business today.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Makes backups great again
author: Gareth E.
pros: When I have used Rubrik it has been excellent, it makes backups easy again and you can near enough set and forget. It doesn't matter if anyone creates a new VM as this can be targeted automatically via the policies to ensure its backed up and your RPO's and RTO's are met. I think it took me longer to rack the device than it did to configure it and take my first backup
cons: Just needs more SSO and 2FA but to be fair they are ahead of many vendors, just worth checking with an SE if yours is supported

review_title: Great product to work with! Simple and intuitive.
author: Ryan K.
pros: The main features for the product are: Incremental forever Backs up Nutanix AHV natively Direct to cloud for backup.
cons: The current cons for the product are: RBAC needs some work NAS backup is still complicated No bare metal support
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Hands down the best backup product I have used
description: This has massively sped up and simplified our whole backup process
author: Mark P.
pros: Ease of use and speed of backups/restores is a real plus. The search on the web interface is also one of the best I have used and works really well.
cons: Cost but its still worth it with the features it offers. Could offer more in the way of e-mail reports and breakdowns on Jobs
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
